seoTitle: Swan View vs Swanbourne — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Swan View and Swanbourne. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Swan View vs Swanbourne: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Swan View and Swanbourne.
heading: Swan View vs Swanbourne — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Swan View, Western Australia and Swanbourne, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Swanbourne has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Swan View (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Swan View or Swanbourne safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Swan View has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Swanbourne scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Swan View scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Swanbourne scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Swan View or Swanbourne?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Swanbourne has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
